title: Elevate Summit Introduction
synopsis: Opening introduction to the Elevate Summit — vision, goals, and what attendees can expect over two days.
who: Entrepreneurs and business owners ready to scale
brief: Neil Moncrief introduces the Elevate Summit and frames the two-day experience.

title: Leading Business Strategies for Scale
synopsis: Jon Cobb shares field-tested strategies for scaling a business beyond the founder bottleneck.
who: Business owners hitting a growth ceiling
brief: Leading Business Strategist Jon Cobb on the critical moves that separate stuck businesses from scaling ones.

title: Elite Mindset: The Inner Game of Success
synopsis: Nathan Velazquez coaches entrepreneurs on the mental frameworks that drive elite performance.
who: Entrepreneurs held back by self-limiting beliefs
brief: Elite Mindset Coach Nathan Velazquez on rewiring how you think about success.

title: Content Strategy That Converts
synopsis: Savanna Harmon breaks down how to build a process-driven content strategy that consistently generates leads.
who: Entrepreneurs struggling to turn content into clients
brief: Process Content Strategist Savanna Harmon on content systems that actually convert.

title: Human Behavior and Business Resilience
synopsis: Guy Hendrix applies human behavior science to help entrepreneurs build resilient businesses and teams.
who: Leaders managing teams and navigating uncertainty
brief: Human Behavior & Resilience Expert Guy Hendrix on the psychology behind durable businesses.

title: Creative Direction and Marketing That Moves
synopsis: Whitney Smith reveals how creative direction and expert marketing work together to build brands people remember.
who: Business owners who want a stronger brand presence
brief: Creative Director & Marketing Expert Whitney Smith on making your brand impossible to ignore.

title: The Choreography of High Performance
synopsis: Taylor James Parrish draws on choreography and movement to teach entrepreneurs how to orchestrate their business with precision.
who: Entrepreneurs looking for an unconventional lens on execution
brief: Choreographer Taylor James Parrish on the surprising parallels between dance and business execution.

title: Finance and Diplomacy: Navigating Global Capital
synopsis: Mauricio Andre brings a senior diplomat's perspective to entrepreneurial finance, helping founders understand global capital flows.
who: Entrepreneurs seeking capital or international expansion
brief: Maestro Finance / Senior Diplomat Mauricio Andre on navigating money at a global scale.

title: Pay Singularity: The Future of Payments
synopsis: Karl Kringle co-presents on how Pay Singularity is reshaping the payments landscape for entrepreneurs.
who: Business owners interested in payments innovation
brief: Co-Founder of Pay Singularity Karl Kringle on what's next in payments.

title: Pay Singularity: Building the Platform
synopsis: Kristi Odea shares the behind-the-scenes of building Pay Singularity and lessons learned scaling a fintech platform.
brief: Co-Founder of Pay Singularity Kristi Odea on the realities of building a fintech startup.

title: Health as a Business Advantage
synopsis: Dr. Rapoport connects entrepreneur health and peak physical performance directly to business outcomes.
brief: Founder of HuffMedical Dr. Nagel Rapoport MD on why your health is your most valuable business asset.

title: VendMaster: Vending as a Scalable Business
synopsis: Jason Furqan presents VendMaster's model for turning vending machine businesses into scalable, semi-passive income streams.
brief: Co-Founder of VendMaster Jason Furqan on scaling vending into a real business.

title: VendMaster: Operations and Growth
synopsis: Brenda Ato covers the operational side of VendMaster — logistics, placement, and growing a vending portfolio.
who: Entrepreneurs interested in vending business operations
brief: Co-Founder of VendMaster Brenda Ato on the day-to-day of running and growing a vending business.
